title: Tax' Fantastic Celestial
description: Fantastic Celestial is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to replace the moon and sun with fantasy themed moon and sun.
body:
![00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b936b89db75c6bd8974fa6e820c44c764041d9ba.png)

Overview:
Fantastic Celestial is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to replace the moon and sun with fantasy  themed moon and sun.
![01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38443074a763200ac049e58612f84c9b02c93aa9_0.webp)

Sun:
The round sun now burns hotter. If you look into it, you will see the eruptions. If you don't have to blink.
![02](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f55cde2557325c6f60dbf1141258ef45248c82f4_0.webp)

Moon:
The round moon was struck by a massive asteroid and split in two. If you look closely, you can see its exposed core glowing.
![03](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eee7b801d244dc16e0516f98541ecd5601c52b74_0.webp)

Installation:
Just drag and drop the .zip file in the folder located at .mineraft/resourcepacks, or just simply use the Curseforge client.

Permission:
You are allowed and welcome to use this modification in your modpack. 

Credit:
Written by Taknax.
